title: September
album: Grandmix Earth Wind & Fire (mixed by Ben Liebrand)
why_this_song: September by Earth, Wind & Fire (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Do you remember the twenty-first night of September?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Do you remember the twenty-first night of September?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Ba-de-ya, dancing in September"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Ba-de-ya, never was a cloudy day"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Ba-de-ya, never was a cloudy day"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Ba-de-ya (de-ya, de-ya), golden dreams were shiny days
The bell was ringing, ha-ha, our souls were singing
Do you remember never a cloudy day? Yow

excerpts.text: Do you remember the twenty-first night of September?
Hey, hey, hey, ba-de-ya, say do you remember?
Ba-de-ya (de-ya, de-ya), never was a cloudy day

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "September" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "September", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "September" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "September" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "September", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "September", o que aconteceria?
